commands.repair_reason: - [P2] No automated branch repair remains; a maintainer should confirm required checks on the reviewed head and merge the PR.; Cleared: The diff adds no dependencies, workflow permissions, lifecycle hooks, downloads, secret access, or third-party code execution; it changes provider routing and tests only. commands.review_summary:
The PR propagates an explicit true/false/unset OpenAI chat-completions setting through CLI, daemon, agent, and provider routing, with regression tests for custom gateways and forced-chat paths.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source deterministically forces chat completions for custom OpenAI base URLs even when the toggle is explicitly false, and the PR body reports a matching gateway-stub reproduction and after-fix run.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No automated branch repair remains; a maintainer should confirm required checks on the reviewed head and merge the PR.

target.title: fix: respect explicit openai chat completion toggle
target.body:
### Summary

This fixes the case where `OPENAI_USE_CHAT_COMPLETIONS=false` / `openai.useChatCompletions=false` was effectively ignored for custom `OPENAI_BASE_URL` values.

The root cause was that the current flow collapsed `false` and `unset` together, and custom OpenAI-compatible base URLs were then forced onto chat completions.

### What changed

- preserve `true | false | unset` for the OpenAI chat-completions toggle
- only auto-force chat completions when the toggle is actually unset
- keep existing auto behavior for OpenRouter and other explicit force-chat paths

### Tests

- `node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/llm.openai-provider.test.ts tests/run.config.test.ts tests/daemon.chat.test.ts tests/run.context.test.ts`
- `node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/daemon.agent.test.ts`

Closes #235.

### Maintainer proof

- Current `main` reproduction: temporary Vitest repro against `resolveOpenAiClientConfig` showed custom `OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://gateway.example/v1` plus `forceChatCompletions=false` still returned `useChatCompletions: true`.
- Fixed CLI proof: local OpenAI-compatible gateway stub with `OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:<port>/v1` and `OPENAI_USE_CHAT_COMPLETIONS=false`; `pnpm -s summarize <tmp>/input.txt --model openai/gpt-5.4 --plain --length short --force-summary --no-cache --timeout 20s` exited 0, made exactly one `POST /v1/responses`, made no `/chat/completions` request, and printed `Gateway proof summary.`.
- Focused tests: `pnpm test tests/daemon.chat.test.ts tests/daemon.agent-model.test.ts tests/llm.openai-provider.test.ts tests/run.summary-engine.test.ts tests/run.config.test.ts tests/run.context.test.ts tests/daemon.agent.test.ts` passed, 7 files / 58 tests.
- Full gate: `pnpm -s check` passed, 410 files passed / 27 skipped, 2071 tests passed / 41 skipped.
- Autoreview: `autoreview --mode uncommitted` and `autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` both clean after accepted findings were fixed.
target.author: mzbgf

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
